action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed because symlink to /data/base_model doesn't work in eval container (different filesystem). Also from_pretrained treats absolute path as repo ID. Analysis: Need to copy model files physically to workspace, and use local_files_only=True. Decision: Copy base model, fix predict.py, start training, submit eval.
